visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, chestnut-brown hair is seen in a brightly lit indoor space with a decorative wallpapered background. She is wearing a simple white T-shirt and is focused on using a light-blue hair styling iron on the ends of her hair. Her expression is concentrated, and she holds the iron with her right hand while guiding her hair with her left. (2) The scene shifts to an outdoor setting during the day. The woman is walking on a sidewalk; the lighting is natural daylight. Her hair now appears significantly more frizzy and voluminous compared to the previous shot. In the background, there is a red brick wall, green foliage, and eventually a busy city street with tall buildings and a public bus passing by. (3) Back indoors, the woman sits at a wooden desk with a silver laptop. She appears distressed, repeatedly touching her messy hair with both hands. A screen capture interface is shown briefly. Then, she holds up three different hair care product bottles in dark purple and pink packaging, smiling broadly at the camera. (4) A series of close-up shots show the physical application of the products. A hand presses a pump, dispensing a clear, viscous liquid, and then a thick pink cream. The woman is seen in a bathroom with white tiled walls, massaging the product into her wet hair. She then uses a white hairdryer, pointing it downwards at her head. (5) The woman, now in a white and blue floral dress, holds up a small bottle of hair oil and a spray bottle. She applies the oil to the ends of her styled, smooth hair. The background is a mix of a tiled bathroom and a room with window blinds. She gestures enthusiastically towards the products while looking directly into the lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: POV. [Subtitle]: 小看台灣濕度的韓國女生的最後. [Variety]: (超級認真燙直). (2) [Subtitle]: 這樣就OK吧? [Variety]: 😎. (3) [Subtitle]: (出門30分鐘後). (4) [Subtitle]: (得到個獅子頭+1). (5) [Variety]: 氣死😂. [Subtitle]: (需求好多😂). (6) [Slogan]: oliveYoung熱銷冠軍? 撫平乾枯毛燥? 夏天使用也不厚重? [Logo]: UNOVE. (7) [Subtitle]: (被UNOVE燒到). (8) [Subtitle]: 他們洗髮精含有30種蛋白質. [Variety]: 氨基酸複合物 5種植物提取. (9) [Subtitle]: 黃金精油深層滋潤強韌髮芯. [Variety]: ✨. (10) [Subtitle]: 就算像我一樣常染頭髮、夾頭髮，讓頭髮很受損，一樣可以擁有柔順的髮質喔. [Slogan]: 但不要忘記!! 一定要一起搭配他們的護髮膜. (11) [Subtitle]: 兩種一起使用效果加倍. [Variety]: 🥰. (12) [Subtitle]: 護髮膜添加35種蛋白質和精華萃取. [Slogan]: 使用3次即可使髮絲蛋白質提升30倍*. (13) [Subtitle]: 最後步驟! 採用Light reflex技術的護髮精油，塗在每根髮絲上，快速滲透，煥發光澤. [Variety]: ✨. (14) [Subtitle]: 還有出門前再搭配免洗護髮噴霧. [Logo]: UNOVE. [Variety]: UNOVE質感香氛. (15) [Subtitle]: 也可以取代香水喔! 免洗的護髮噴霧 出門前急救毛躁糾結髮. [Variety]: ♡. (16) [Subtitle]: 在台灣這種超濕熱的天氣壓力超大，但用了這款UNOVE之後，日常整個變輕鬆了很多. [Slogan]: 它包含高濃度營養成分，但質地完全不厚重，頭髮不會塌，也不會黏黏的. [Variety]: 😍. (17) [Subtitle]: 而且現在Seventeen的MINGYU就是UNOVE的代言人. [Logo]: olive Young. [Slogan]: UNOVE全系列在台灣屈臣氏也能買到!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown wavy hair, wearing a white t-shirt in some scenes and a blue and white floral dress in others.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features a tiled bathroom, a room with decorative cream wallpaper, and an urban street with brick walls, trees, and city buildings.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop background music featuring a prominent 4/4 drum beat and synth melodies. A clear female voice starts narrating in Mandarin with high pitch variability and a friendly, engaging tone. A distinct 'pop' sound effect punctuates the start of the narration. (2) As the scene transitions, a sharp 'whoosh' sound effect is heard, signifying a change in the acoustic atmosphere. The female voice continues with a slightly dramatic, complaining tone, and the background music remains at a consistent volume. The ambient noise floor is low, suggesting a post-produced track. (3) A series of quick 'bubble pop' and 'UI click' sound effects are synchronized with the appearance of text and graphics. The background music maintains its tempo, roughly 120 BPM. The narrator's speech rate is moderately fast, conveying excitement as she introduces the solution to her hair problem. (4) A prominent, broadband noise of a hairdryer is heard for several seconds, temporarily increasing the spectral density of the mix. Despite this, the narration and music remain audible through careful ducking and leveling. The voice becomes more instructional and authoritative while describing product benefits. (5) The upbeat BGM continues to drive the rhythm until the end of the video. The female voice concludes the segment with a rising, persuasive intonation. A final, soft 'shimmer' or 'ding' sound effect marks the end of the production, followed by a quick fade-out of the music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Problem -> Solution -> Demonstration -> Result -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional endorsement for UNOVE hair care products, using a relatable 'problem-solution' narrative. It highlights the issue of frizzy hair in humid climates and positions the brand's shampoo, treatment, and oil as the ultimate solution for maintaining smooth hair.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcasing, demonstration of use, and mention of celebrity spokesperson (Mingyu).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes social media editing trends, such as high-density text overlays and upbeat BGM, to appeal to a younger demographic interested in beauty and hair care.
